description: Codex AGENTS.md contains stale .claude/ command paths
query: Run an APD audit for this Codex project.

files.AGENTS.md:
# App

## Stack
| Layer | Tech |
|---|---|
| API | FastAPI |

## APD

### Pipeline
Run `bash .claude/bin/apd pipeline status` before each task.

### Guardrails
The agents live under `.claude/agents/`.

### Mandatory skills
- /apd-tdd
- /apd-debug
- /apd-finish

### Human gate
Ask before push.
files..apd/agents/backend-builder.md:
---
name: backend-builder
description: Implements backend features
model: gpt-5.4
maxTurns: 60
scope:
  - app/
---

# backend-builder

FORBIDDEN: do not commit. Before every write call apd:apd_guard_write(apd_role="backend-builder", file_path="...").
files..apd/agents/code-reviewer.md:
---
name: code-reviewer
description: Read-only reviewer
model: gpt-5.4
effort: max
scope: []
readonly: true
---

# code-reviewer

FORBIDDEN: do not edit files.
files..codex/config.toml:
[mcp_servers.apd]
command = "uv"
args = ["run", "--with", "mcp", "python", "mcp/apd_mcp_server.py"]
cwd = "plugins/apd"

[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_ping]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_doctor]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_advance_pipeline]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_guard_write]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_verify_step]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_adversarial_pass]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_list_agents]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_pipeline_state]
approval_mode = "approve"

expected_behavior: detects stale .claude/ references in AGENTS.md for a Codex-only project
categorizes the finding as IMPORTANT because the orchestrator would follow non-Codex paths
prescribes replacing .claude/bin/apd pipeline references with Codex MCP tools such as apd:apd_pipeline_state()
does not report this as a missing Claude setup problem; the project is Codex-native
